arb_levels_verified.label: cap_floor
arb_levels_verified.context_snippet: ments, from our inception through the measurement date. Gross Earning Assets as of December 31, 2025 were approximately $21.1 billion

verdict.regime_flip: Structure flips if $12.50 is breached because dealer hedging reverses direction at that OI concentration.
